definition_population.content: Chronic systemic autoimmune disease causing symmetric inflammatory polyarthritis; female predominance; mid-adulthood onset. Note: the task brief's claim that a fuller deep-dive RA dossier exists elsewhere in the project could not be verified via artifact-store search in this session.

epidemiology.content: Not established in this pass — no epidemiology figures were re-sourced. The task brief's claim that a fuller pre-existing RA dossier holds this detail could not be verified via artifact-store search in this session.

biology.content: TYK2 is a JAK-family kinase central to cytokine signaling, actively targeted by TYK2 inhibitors in RA/PsA. TBC1D10A has a much lower OT genetic-association score (0.08 vs TYK2's 0.93), consistent with a lower-confidence platform nomination.

sources.quote: Successful Management of Multidrug-Resistant Psoriatic Arthritis Coexisting With Rheumatoid Arthritis Using a TYK2 Inhibitor Deucravacitinib-Based Regimen

treatment.content: Standard RA therapy: methotrexate, biologic DMARDs, JAK inhibitors (tofacitinib carries FDA black-box warning). Full detail claimed to exist in a prior dossier per the task brief, but that dossier is unverified via artifact-store search in this session.

sources.quote: The US Food and Drug Administration (FDA) recently placed a black box warning on this class of medications due to safety concerns based on data from studies investigating tofacitinib in patients with rheumatoid arthritis.

regulatory_trials.content: 2,538 total interventional trials for RA on ClinicalTrials.gov. Example completed Phase 3 biosimilar trial: NCT03789292.

sources.quote: A Randomized, Active-Controlled, Double-Blind, Phase 3 Study to Compare Efficacy and Safety of CT-P17 With Humira When Co-administered With Methotrexate in Patients With Moderate to Severe Active Rheumatoid Arthritis

gaps: This task's brief asserted a full deep-dive RA dossier (TBC1D10A rank6/TYK2 rank11) already exists elsewhere in the project; artifact-store searches in this session (search='rheumatoid arthritis dossier', 'TYK2 rheumatoid', 'TBC1D10A', project_id='all') did NOT locate it — its existence is unverified, not confirmed.
Epidemiology not re-sourced in this pass.
